dict.string: nettle needs access to your Downloads folder to browse local files and download files here from remote hosts.
nettle needs access to your Documents folder to browse local files and transfer them to and from remote hosts.
nettle needs access to your Desktop folder to browse local files and transfer them to and from remote hosts.
nettle needs access to removable volumes to browse local files and transfer them to and from remote hosts.
nettle needs access to network volumes to browse local files and transfer them to and from remote hosts.
